clusters.justification: These terms share neuroimaging co-activations across the anterior insula, cingulate, and amygdala, representing the overarching axis of processing valence, general mood, and physiological arousal.
These terms are unified by their engagement of striatal, dopaminergic, and ventromedial prefrontal circuits underlying the computation of expected outcomes, reward-seeking, and goal-directed drive.
These concepts reliably engage the default mode network, representing a broad axis of internally-constructed representations regarding personal identity, episodic context, and interpersonal dynamics.
